variant_name: 高令宁 — 前世惨烈新娘
trigger: 前世新婚次日，面对婆母与情敌的刁难，砸碎茶杯抹脖子反击的闪回场景

appearance_delta.face: 面色苍白，眼神充满极致的怨恨、屈辱与同归于尽的疯狂
appearance_delta.body: 紧绷，因情绪激动而微微颤抖
appearance_delta.hair: 新妇发髻略显凌乱，有发丝垂落
appearance_delta.distinguishing_features: 脖颈处有刚用碎瓷片划破的伤口，鲜血流出，触目惊心

costume_override.outfit: 华丽但略显凌乱的古代新娘喜服/敬茶吉服

visual_reference: A beautiful young ancient Chinese bride in a gorgeous red traditional wedding Hanfu, messy hair, pale face with an extremely resentful and crazy expression, holding a broken porcelain piece, fresh blood dripping from a cut on her neck, cinematic lighting, dramatic shadows, tragic and broken atmosphere, 8k resolution, photorealistic.
emotional_tone: 极致的怨恨、屈辱与刚烈
